'''hakushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabal|cabal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabal|cabal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hakushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækishith|hækishith]] || [[word:hækishij|hækishij]] || [[word:hækishish|hækishish]] || [[word:hækishi|hækishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakukushuth|hakukushuth]] || [[word:hakukushuj|hakukushuj]] || [[word:hakukushush|hakukushush]] || [[word:hakukushu|hakukushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakushuth|hakushuth]] || [[word:hakushuj|hakushuj]] || [[word:hakushush|hakushush]] || [[word:hakushu|hakushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakufshuth|hakufshuth]] || [[word:hakufshuj|hakufshuj]] || [[word:hakufshush|hakufshush]] || [[word:hakufshuf|hakufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakushuthu|hakushuthu]] || [[word:hakushuju|hakushuju]] || [[word:hakushushu|hakushushu]] || [[word:hakushuku|hakushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakushuth|hakushuth]] || [[word:hakushuj|hakushuj]] || [[word:hakushush|hakushush]] || [[word:hakushu|hakushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakushuthul|hakushuthul]] || [[word:hakushujul|hakushujul]] || [[word:hakushushul|hakushushul]] || [[word:hakushukul|hakushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakushuthuthu|hakushuthuthu]] || [[word:hakushujuju|hakushujuju]] || [[word:hakushushushu|hakushushushu]] || [[word:hakushuku|hakushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakushuthun|hakushuthun]] || [[word:hakushujun|hakushujun]] || [[word:hakushushun|hakushushun]] || [[word:hakushukun|hakushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakushuthuoro|hakushuthuoro]] || [[word:hakushujuoro|hakushujuoro]] || [[word:hakushushuoro|hakushushuoro]] || [[word:hakushukuoro|hakushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
